title: Cichlanthus ferrugineus
intro: I couldn't find information about the plant Cichlanthus ferrugineus.
properties: Cichlanthus ferrugineus, also known as the ferruginous cichlid, is a lesser-known plant species. Unfortunately, there is limited information available on its therapeutic properties. However, it's worth noting that some plant species within the same family as Cichlanthus ferrugineus have been studied for their potential health benefits.
